question: How many kinds of products have not been sold?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) FROM Products p LEFT JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_item_id IS NULL;

back_translation.intent: 统计未在订单项中出现的产品数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题'How many kinds of products have not been sold?'的意图，即统计未在订单项中出现的产品数量。
